summary: The diff implements all four requirements: a LoginSelection landing page, a dedicated AdminLogin page with Internet Identity auth, a CustomerLogin page with username/password auth, and updated routing in App.tsx. Route protection is handled inline in AdminPanel.tsx and CustomerPortal.tsx. All major acceptance criteria appear to be met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin session persists across page refreshes
missing_requirements.reason: The diff relies on useInternetIdentity for session persistence but there is no explicit evidence in the diff that Internet Identity session restoration is configured or verified to persist across page refreshes in the new AdminLogin/AdminPanel flow. The AdminPanel redirects unauthenticated users to /admin-login on render, but no session rehydration logic is shown.
